# CLARA Reviews AI Assistant — Test Cases for Second/Third Line (Oversight) Persona

**Source Document**: BRD - CLARA Reviews AI Assistant
**Persona**: Second Line / Third Line (SOX Leadership, Audit, Controllership)
**Date Generated**: June 2, 2026
**Generated by**: pm-builder-agent
**⚠️ NOT IN CURRENT PILOT** — These test cases are for future validation only. Do not execute against gamma.

---

## Persona Context

**Role**: SOX leadership, Audit, and Controllership teams providing oversight across organizations and quarters. Responsible for trend analysis, coaching, and proactive risk identification.

**Key Pain Points**:
- Manual spreadsheet analysis taking hours per quarter
- Reactive issue discovery (finding problems after they've escalated)
- No real-time visibility into review quality across org
- Offline analysis — disconnected from live review data

**CLARA Value Proposition**:
- Always-on analytics replacing offline spreadsheets
- Automated trend detection across reviews
- Natural language queries for instant oversight tables
- Coaching recommendations based on patterns
- 75% reduction in manual trend analysis time

---

## Test Suite 1: Natural Language Oversight Table Generation (Epic-10.1)

### TC-OVR-001: Basic natural language query — "Show all high-risk reviews"
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Review data exists for current quarter; user has Second/Third Line access

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Enter prompt: "Show all high-risk reviews this quarter" | CLARA processes NLU query within 5 seconds |
| 2 | Verify table generated | Structured oversight table rendered with correct columns |
| 3 | Verify required columns | Review Set Name, Review ID, Review Question Response, Review Question Comment, Document ID, Document Name, Document Type, Document Owner, Document Owner Email, Assigned To, Controllership Point of Contact |
| 4 | Verify column order consistency | Same order in UI and exports |
| 5 | Verify navigation links | Each review has direct link to review detail and SOX document page |

### TC-OVR-002: Natural language query — "Show controls that failed operating effectiveness"
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: At least one control has Operating Effectiveness = No in current quarter

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Enter prompt: "Show controls that failed operating effectiveness for Q4 2025" | CLARA interprets query correctly |
| 2 | Verify filtered results | Only controls where Operating Effectiveness = "No" shown |
| 3 | Verify all columns populated | Review ID, Control Name, Owner, Controllership Contact visible with links |

### TC-OVR-003: Natural language query — "Show documents with response = No and missing Controllership Contact"
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Documents exist with "No" response and unmapped Controllership Contact

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Enter compound query | CLARA handles multiple filter conditions |
| 2 | Verify AND logic applied | Results match BOTH conditions (response=No AND no Controllership Contact) |
| 3 | Verify unmapped contact display | Shows "— Not mapped —" without blocking workflow |

### TC-OVR-004: Natural language query — invalid/unclear prompt
**Priority**: P1
**Precondition**: User enters ambiguous query

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Enter unclear prompt: "show me stuff" | CLARA asks for clarification or shows suggested prompts |
| 2 | Verify no error crash | Graceful handling — no unhandled exceptions |
| 3 | Verify suggested prompts offered | Example queries shown to guide user |

---

## Test Suite 2: Inspection-Worthy Filtering (Epic-10.2)

### TC-OVR-005: Only inspection-worthy reviews displayed
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Mix of compliant and non-compliant reviews in current quarter

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Generate oversight table | Only rows where risk classification ≠ compliant shown |
| 2 | Verify exclusions | Reviews with all "Yes" and no anomalies are excluded from table |
| 3 | Verify inclusion criteria | Rows included when: response indicates failure/change/anomaly/comment |

### TC-OVR-006: Filter by Significance (Key vs Non-Key)
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Mix of Key and Non-Key documents

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Select "Key" significance filter | Table shows only Key-significance items |
| 2 | Switch to "Non-Key" | Table refreshes with Non-Key items only |
| 3 | Select both / "All" | Shows all significance levels |

### TC-OVR-007: Filter by SOX Tier (SOX 404, SOX, ICFR)
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Mix of SOX 404, SOX, and ICFR documents

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Select "SOX 404" tier filter | Only SOX 404 items displayed |
| 2 | Verify default | Default view shows SOX 404 only |
| 3 | Toggle to include Non-404 | SOX and ICFR items added to view |

---

## Test Suite 3: SOX 404 Distinction (Epic-10.3)

### TC-OVR-008: SOX 404 chip visible on applicable rows
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Table includes SOX 404 items

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | View oversight table | SOX 404 items have visible chip/badge distinguishing them |
| 2 | Verify chip is always visible | Chip remains visible regardless of column scroll |

### TC-OVR-009: Default filtering to SOX 404
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: First load of oversight table

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open oversight dashboard for first time | Default filter = SOX 404 only |
| 2 | Verify Non-404 requires explicit toggle | Non-404 items not shown until user toggles |

---

## Test Suite 4: Risk Summary Generation (Epic-10.4)

### TC-OVR-010: Risk summary for selected review set
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Oversight table rendered with data; user selects a review set node

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Select review set node (e.g., "Q4 2025 Controls — Key, SOX 404") | Risk summary generates |
| 2 | Verify summary content | Shows: total inspection items, split by category (ineffective controls, monitoring gaps, design failures, operating ineffectiveness) |
| 3 | Verify example format | "12 inspection items: 3 ineffective controls, 4 monitoring gaps, 2 design failures, 3 operating ineffectiveness" |

### TC-OVR-011: Risk summary with zero inspection items
**Priority**: P1
**Precondition**: All reviews in selected set are compliant

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Select compliant review set | Summary shows: "0 inspection items — all reviews compliant" |
| 2 | Verify positive confirmation | Clear message that no action required |

---

## Test Suite 5: Cross-Layer Pivot (Epic-10.5)

### TC-OVR-012: Pivot from Controls to Applications view
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Currently viewing Control-level oversight table

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Click "Applications" pivot | Table refreshes with Application-level reviews |
| 2 | Verify fast pivot | Refresh completes within 3 seconds |
| 3 | Verify filter persistence | Significance and SOX Tier filters carry over |
| 4 | Verify only attention-worthy shown | Compliant applications excluded |

### TC-OVR-013: Pivot from Applications to Processes view
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Currently viewing Application-level table

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Click "Processes" pivot | Table refreshes with Process-level reviews |
| 2 | Verify inspection-worthy only | Only processes with non-compliant signals shown |
| 3 | Verify controllership mapping message | Shows "Viewing Oversight Table with uploaded controllership mapping…" |

### TC-OVR-014: Pivot with Key + SOX 404 defaults
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: User pivots between views

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Pivot to any view | Defaults to Key + SOX 404 population |
| 2 | Verify filter controls | Significance and SOX Tier dropdowns available for adjustment |

## Test Suite 6: Risk Classification Criteria (Appendix 1 — Process Triggers)

### TC-OVR-015: P-1 — Documentation Accuracy failure flagged
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Review Owner selected "No" for process documentation accuracy

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | View oversight table | Row appears classified as "documentation design risk" |
| 2 | Verify ownership visible | Document Owner and Controllership Contact columns populated |
| 3 | Verify link to review | Direct navigation to the specific review |

### TC-OVR-016: P-3 — Financial Reporting Risk Coverage failure
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Review Owner selected "No" for mapped financial reporting risks

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | View oversight table | Row appears as "material SOX design risk" |
| 2 | Verify prioritization | Item appears in risk summaries and certification-impact narratives |

### TC-OVR-017: P-5 — Emerging Reviewer Concerns flagged
**Priority**: P1
**Precondition**: Review Owner provided non-empty comments requiring approver attention

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | View oversight table | Row appears as "emerging qualitative risk" |
| 2 | Verify inclusion in narratives | Appears in oversight narratives and escalation views |

## Test Suite 7: Risk Classification — Application Triggers

**Priority**: P0

|------|--------|-----------------|

## Test Suite 8: Risk Classification — Control Triggers

### TC-OVR-021: C-1 — IPA Documentation Integrity failure (Manual control)
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Manual control, owner selected "N/A" or "No" for IPA completeness

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | View Control oversight | Row flagged as "evidence integrity risk" |
| 2 | Verify remediation surfacing | Appears in oversight prompts for remediation |

### TC-OVR-022: C-2 — IPA Validation Anomaly (Automated control with "Yes")
**Priority**: P1
**Precondition**: Automated control, owner selected "Yes" for IPA (unexpected)

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | View Control oversight | Row flagged as "unexpected IPA dependency anomaly" |
| 2 | Verify verification prompt | Surfaces for reviewer verification |

### TC-OVR-023: C-3 — Design Effectiveness Failure
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Owner selected "No" for design effectiveness

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | View Control oversight | Row classified as "critical SOX design failure" |
| 2 | Verify highest priority | Prioritized in certification-risk summaries |

### TC-OVR-024: C-4 — Operating Effectiveness Failure
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Owner selected "No" for operating effectiveness

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | View Control oversight | Row classified as "confirmed ineffective control" — highest severity |
| 2 | Verify SOX exposure surfacing | Appears as highest-severity SOX exposure |

## Test Suite 9: Trend Analysis

### TC-OVR-025: Common rejection reasons visible
**Priority**: P1
**Precondition**: Multiple quarters of rejection data available

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Navigate to trend analysis | CLARA surfaces: review quality metrics by org/control type |
| 2 | Verify rejection patterns | Common rejection reasons shown with frequency percentages |
| 3 | Verify evidence gap trends | Recurring evidence gaps identified across reviews |

### TC-OVR-026: Controls with repeat failures identified
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: A control has failed effectiveness in 2+ consecutive quarters

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | View trend data | Controls with repeat failures highlighted |
| 2 | Verify escalation readiness | Drill-down available to specific review history |
| 3 | Verify coaching recommendation | Targeted coaching suggestion for the control owner |

---

## Test Suite 10: Action & Export

### TC-OVR-027: Drill into specific review from oversight table
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Oversight table rendered with inspection items

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Click review link in table | Navigates to full review detail page |
| 2 | Verify context preserved | Can return to oversight table without losing filters |

### TC-OVR-028: Generate oversight report
**Priority**: P1
**Precondition**: Oversight table with filtered data

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Click "Generate Report" or equivalent | Report generated from current view |
| 2 | Verify export format | PDF or Excel with same columns and data |
| 3 | Verify AI-free export | No CLARA metadata in exported report (AI governance compliant) |

### TC-OVR-029: Coaching recommendations generated
**Priority**: P1
**Precondition**: Pattern data shows specific team consistently missing evidence

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | View coaching section | Targeted recommendation: "Team X consistently missing monitoring evidence — suggest training on Delta registration process" |
| 2 | Verify data-backed | Recommendation includes data (frequency, team, pattern) |

---

## Test Suite 11: Performance & Access

### TC-OVR-030: Oversight table generation within SLA
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Standard natural language query

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Submit NL query | Table renders within 5 seconds (query-to-render) |
| 2 | Verify loading indicator | Progress shown during generation |

### TC-OVR-031: Access control — Second/Third Line sees org-wide data
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: User has Second/Third Line role

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Query oversight data | Results span entire organization (not limited to own reviews) |
| 2 | Verify First Line CANNOT access | A Review Owner role cannot see oversight tables |

### TC-OVR-032: Graceful degradation when Bedrock unavailable
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Bedrock/NLU service unavailable

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Enter natural language query | Graceful error: "AI query processing unavailable. Please use manual filters." |
| 2 | Verify manual filters work | Standard dropdown/checkbox filters still functional |
| 3 | Verify table still renderable | Pre-built views (without NL) still load |

---

## Test Suite 12: Controllership Contact Mapping

### TC-OVR-033: Controllership Contact displayed when mapped
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Document has Controllership Contact configured

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | View oversight table | Controllership Point of Contact column shows contact name/alias |
| 2 | Verify email in separate column | Document Owner Email column populated |

### TC-OVR-034: Missing Controllership Contact handled gracefully
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Document has NO Controllership Contact mapped

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | View oversight table | Shows "— Not mapped —" in Controllership Contact column |
| 2 | Verify no blocking | Row still appears; missing contact doesn't hide the item |
| 3 | Verify filterable | Can filter to "unmapped" contacts to identify gaps |
